expectations.text: The agent uses 'uv run' (not 'npm run deploy') to invoke the script
expectations.evidence: Without-skill response does not mention uv at all. It suggests 'pac CLI', 'XrmToolBox', or generic Dataverse API — no knowledge of the project's deploy.py script

expectations.text: The agent runs the command from the workspace root (not from inside the skill directory)
expectations.evidence: No command is run at all. Agent asks clarifying questions instead of executing anything

expectations.text: The agent reports back to the user with the deploy result — success or a specific error message
expectations.evidence: Agent asks 'could you tell me what deployment tool you use for D365?' — it never deploys or reports a result

expectations.text: The agent does NOT ask the user to run the command themselves
expectations.evidence: Response says 'Please share your current deployment setup' and 'If you can share your usual deployment workflow, I can help automate it' — puts the burden on the user

uncertainties: Does not know which tool to use for D365 deployment

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions — the contrast between with/without is clear and all assertions are well-targeted.
